name: Your Purpose
description:
Sometimes you just feel like /iplaying Minecraft. /x

To relax? /iThat's fine/x
To build? /iThat's fine/x
To adventure? /iThat's fine/x
To mine? /iThat's fine/x
To craft? /iThat's fine/x

I have one favor to ask though.

Only /lYou/x can do this.

/lLeave your mark, whatever you think only /lyou can do in this world.

/rPlace your/x /ename/x /gupon it./x

Oh right, be sure to read all the things here. There's like 3 more tabs on the left side.
Each entry is short though! 3 sentences each.
That's all you need to know!
